# Chapter 6: Operating systems  (~110 pp)
- 6.1 What an OS does (12) · 6.2 Processes, threads, scheduling (18) · 6.3 Memory: virtual memory, paging (15) · 6.4 Filesystems (15) · 6.5 I/O, drivers, interrupts (15) · 6.6 Containers, virtualisation (15) · 6.7 Real-time operating systems (10) · 6.8 Failure section: thrashing, priority inversion, deadlocks; Mars Pathfinder (10)
